verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est sermo Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the word of the Lord came to me, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran sana tapahtui minulle ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: The word of the Lord came again unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fili hominis, duæ mulieres filiæ matris unius fuerunt :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֑ם שְׁתַּ֣יִם נָשִׁ֔ים בְּנ֥וֹת אֵם־אַחַ֖ת הָיֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Son of man, there were two women, daughters of one mother.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä, ihmisen poika, kaksi vaimoa oli yhden äidin tytärtä:
verses.king_james: Son of man, there were two women, the daughters of one mother:

verses.latin_vulgate: et fornicatæ sunt in Ægypto,  in adolescentia sua fornicatæ sunt :  ibi subacta sunt ubera earum,  et fractæ sunt mammæ pubertatis earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּזְנֶ֣ינָה בְמִצְרַ֔יִם בִּנְעוּרֵיהֶ֖ן זָנ֑וּ שָׁ֚מָּה מֹעֲכ֣וּ שְׁדֵיהֶ֔ן וְשָׁ֣ם עִשּׂ֔וּ דַּדֵּ֖י בְּתוּלֵיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they committed fornication in Egypt, in their youth they committed fornication: there were their breasts pressed down, and the teats of their virginity were bruised.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät tekivät huorin Egyptissä, he tekivät huorin nuoruudessansa; siellä antoivat he pidellä rintojansa, ja taputellla neitsyytensä nisiä.
verses.king_james: And they committed whoredoms in Egypt; they committed whoredoms in their youth: there were their breasts pressed, and there they bruised the teats of their virginity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nomina autem earum,  Oolla major, et Ooliba soror ejus minor :  et habui eas, et pepererunt filios et filias.  Porro earum nomina,  Samaria Oolla, et Jerusalem Ooliba.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁמוֹתָ֗ן אׇהֳלָ֤ה הַגְּדוֹלָה֙ וְאׇהֳלִיבָ֣ה אֲחוֹתָ֔הּ וַתִּהְיֶ֣ינָה לִ֔י וַתֵּלַ֖דְנָה בָּנִ֣ים וּבָנ֑וֹת וּשְׁמוֹתָ֕ן שֹׁמְר֣וֹן אׇהֳלָ֔ה וִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם אׇהֳלִיבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their names were Oolla the elder, and Ooliba her younger sister: and I took them, and they bore sons and daughters. Now for their names, Samaria is Oolla, and Jerusalem is Ooliba.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suuremman nimi oli Ohola, ja hänen sisarensa Oholiba. Ja minä otin heidät aviokseni, ja he synnyttivät poikia ja tyttäriä. Ja Ohola kutsuttiin Samariaksi ja Oholiba Jerusalemiksi.
verses.king_james: And the names of them were Aholah the elder, and Aholibah her sister: and they were mine, and they bare sons and daughters. Thus were their names; Samaria is Aholah, and Jerusalem Aholibah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fornicata est igitur super me Oolla,  et insanivit in amatores suos,  in Assyrios propinquantes,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּ֥זֶן אׇהֳלָ֖ה תַּחְתָּ֑י וַתֶּעְגַּב֙ עַֽל־מְאַהֲבֶ֔יהָ אֶל־אַשּׁ֖וּר קְרוֹבִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Oolla committed fornication against me, and doted on her lovers, on the Assyrians that came to her,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ohola teki huorin, kuin minä hänen ottanut olin, ja rakasti värtämiehiänsä Assyrialaisia, jotka hänen tykönsä tulivat:
verses.king_james: And Aholah played the harlot when she was mine; and she doted on her lovers, on the Assyrians her neighbours,

verses.latin_vulgate: vestitos hyacintho,  principes et magistratus,  juvenes cupidinis,  universos equites, ascensores equorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְבֻשֵׁ֤י תְכֵ֙לֶת֙ פַּח֣וֹת וּסְגָנִ֔ים בַּח֥וּרֵי חֶ֖מֶד כֻּלָּ֑ם פָּרָשִׁ֕ים רֹכְבֵ֖י סוּסִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who were clothed with blue, princes, and rulers, beautiful youths, all horsemen, mounted upon horses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silkillä vaatetettuja päämiehiä ja esimiehiä, kaikkia nuoria ihanaisia miehiä, hevosmiehiä, jotka hevosilla ajoivat;
verses.king_james: Which were clothed with blue, captains and rulers, all of them desirable young men, horsemen riding upon horses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dedit fornicationes suas super eos electos,  filios Assyriorum universos :  et in omnibus in quos insanivit,  in immunditiis eorum polluta est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּתֵּ֤ן תַּזְנוּתֶ֙יהָ֙ עֲלֵיהֶ֔ם מִבְחַ֥ר בְּנֵֽי־אַשּׁ֖וּר כֻּלָּ֑ם וּבְכֹ֧ל אֲשֶׁר־עָגְבָ֛ה בְּכׇל־גִּלּוּלֵיהֶ֖ם נִטְמָֽאָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she committed her fornications with those chosen men, all sons of the Assyrians: and she defiled herself with the uncleanness of all them on whom she doted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja makasi kaikkein nuorten miesten kanssa Assyriasta, ja saastutti itsensä kaikkiin heidän jumaliinsa, kussa ikänä hän jonkun osasi.
verses.king_james: Thus she committed her whoredoms with them, with all them that were the chosen men of Assyria, and with all on whom she doted: with all their idols she defiled herself.

verses.latin_vulgate: Insuper et fornicationes suas, quas habuerat in Ægypto, non reliquit :  nam et illi dormierunt cum ea in adolescentia ejus,  et illi confregerunt ubera pubertatis ejus,  et effuderunt fornicationem suam super eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־תַּזְנוּתֶ֤יהָ מִמִּצְרַ֙יִם֙ לֹ֣א עָזָ֔בָה כִּ֤י אוֹתָהּ֙ שָׁכְב֣וּ בִנְעוּרֶ֔יהָ וְהֵ֥מָּה עִשּׂ֖וּ דַּדֵּ֣י בְתוּלֶ֑יהָ וַיִּשְׁפְּכ֥וּ תַזְנוּתָ֖ם עָלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover also she did not forsake her fornications which she had committed in Egypt: for they also lay with her in her youth, and they bruised the breasts of her virginity, and poured out their fornication upon her.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vielä sitte ei hän hyljännyt huoruuttansa Egyptin kanssa; että he hänen kanssansa maanneet olivat hänen nuoruudessansa, ja jotka hänen neitsyytensä nisiä taputtelleet, ja suuressa huoruudessa hänen kanssansa olleet olivat.
verses.king_james: Neither left she her whoredoms brought from Egypt: for in her youth they lay with her, and they bruised the breasts of her virginity, and poured their whoredom upon her.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea tradidi eam in manus amatorum suorum,  in manus filiorum Assur,  super quorum insanivit libidine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֥ן נְתַתִּ֖יהָ בְּיַד־מְאַהֲבֶ֑יהָ בְּיַד֙ בְּנֵ֣י אַשּׁ֔וּר אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָגְבָ֖ה עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore have I delivered her into the hands of her lovers, into the hands of the sons of the Assyrians, upon whose lust she doted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden minä hylkäsin hänet värtämiestensä käsiin, Assurin lasten käsiin, joita hän himostansa rakasti.
verses.king_james: Wherefore I have delivered her into the hand of her lovers, into the hand of the Assyrians, upon whom she doted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsi discooperuerunt ignominiam ejus,  filios et filias ejus tulerunt,  et ipsam occiderunt gladio :  et factæ sunt famosæ mulieres,  et judicia perpetraverunt in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵ֘מָּה֮ גִּלּ֣וּ עֶרְוָתָהּ֒ בָּנֶ֤יהָ וּבְנוֹתֶ֙יהָ֙ לָקָ֔חוּ וְאוֹתָ֖הּ בַּחֶ֣רֶב הָרָ֑גוּ וַתְּהִי־שֵׁם֙ לַנָּשִׁ֔ים וּשְׁפוּטִ֖ים עָ֥שׂוּ בָֽהּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: They discovered her disgrace, took away her sons and daughters, and slew her with the sword: and they became infamous women, and they executed judgments in her.
verses.finnish_biblia: He paljastivat hänen häpynsä, ja ottivat hänen poikansa ja tyttärensä pois, mutta hänen he miekalla tappoivat. Ja sanoma kuului vaimoin seassa, että tämä rangaistus oli.
verses.king_james: These discovered her nakedness: they took her sons and her daughters, and slew her with the sword: and she became famous among women; for they had executed judgment upon her.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum vidisset soror ejus Ooliba,  plus quam illa insanivit libidine,  et fornicationem suam super fornicationem sororis suæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֙רֶא֙ אֲחוֹתָ֣הּ אׇהֳלִיבָ֔ה וַתַּשְׁחֵ֥ת עַגְבָתָ֖הּ מִמֶּ֑נָּה וְאֶ֨ת־תַּזְנוּתֶ֔יהָ מִזְּנוּנֵ֖י אֲחוֹתָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when her sister Ooliba saw this, she was mad with lust more than she: and she carried her fornication beyond the fornication of her sister.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kuin Oholiba, hänen sisarensa, sen näki, syttyi se rakkaudesta pahemmin kuin toinen, ja teki enemmin huorin kuin hänen sisarensa huoruus oli.
verses.king_james: And when her sister Aholibah saw this, she was more corrupt in her inordinate love than she, and in her whoredoms more than her sister in her whoredoms.

verses.latin_vulgate: ad filios Assyriorum præbuit impudenter,  ducibus et magistratibus ad se venientibus,  indutis veste varia,  equitibus qui vectabantur equis,  et adolescentibus forma cunctis egregia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶל־בְּנֵי֩ אַשּׁ֨וּר עָגָ֜בָה פַּח֨וֹת וּסְגָנִ֤ים קְרֹבִים֙ לְבֻשֵׁ֣י מִכְל֔וֹל פָּרָשִׁ֖ים רֹכְבֵ֣י סוּסִ֑ים בַּח֥וּרֵי חֶ֖מֶד כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Impudently prostituting herself to the children of the Assyrians, the princes, and rulers that came to her, clothed with divers colours, to the horsemen that rode upon horses, and to young men all of great beauty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja rakasti Assurin lapsia, päämiehiä ja esimiehiä, jotka hänen tykönsä tulivat kauniisti vaatetettuna, hevosmiehiä, jotka hevosilla ajoivat, kaikkia nuoria ihanaisia miehiä.
verses.king_james: She doted upon the Assyrians her neighbours, captains and rulers clothed most gorgeously, horsemen riding upon horses, all of them desirable young men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vidi quod polluta esset via una ambarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֵ֖רֶא כִּ֣י נִטְמָ֑אָה דֶּ֥רֶךְ אֶחָ֖ד לִשְׁתֵּיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I saw that she was defiled, and that they both took one way.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin minä näin, että he molemmat yhdellä tavalla itsensä saastuttaneet olivat.
verses.king_james: Then I saw that she was defiled, that they took both one way,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et auxit fornicationes suas :  cumque vidisset viros depictos in pariete,  imagines Chaldæorum expressas coloribus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתּ֖וֹסֶף אֶל־תַּזְנוּתֶ֑יהָ וַתֵּ֗רֶא אַנְשֵׁי֙ מְחֻקֶּ֣ה עַל־הַקִּ֔יר צַלְמֵ֣י (כשדיים) [כַשְׂדִּ֔ים] חֲקֻקִ֖ים בַּשָּׁשַֽׁר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she increased her fornications: and when she had seen men painted on the wall, the images of the Chaldeans set forth in colours,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta tämä teki vielä enemmin huorin; sillä kuin hän näki punaisella maalilla maalatuita miehiä seinissä, Kaldealaisten kuvia,
verses.king_james: And that she increased her whoredoms: for when she saw men pourtrayed upon the wall, the images of the Chaldeans pourtrayed with vermilion,

verses.latin_vulgate: et accinctos balteis renes,  et tiaras tinctas in capitibus eorum,  formam ducum omnium,  similitudinem filiorum Babylonis,  terræque Chaldæorum, in qua orti sunt,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֲגוֹרֵ֨י אֵז֜וֹר בְּמׇתְנֵיהֶ֗ם סְרוּחֵ֤י טְבוּלִים֙ בְּרָ֣אשֵׁיהֶ֔ם מַרְאֵ֥ה שָׁלִשִׁ֖ים כֻּלָּ֑ם דְּמ֤וּת בְּנֵֽי־בָבֶל֙ כַּשְׂדִּ֔ים אֶ֖רֶץ מוֹלַדְתָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And girded with girdles about their reins, and with dyed turbans on their heads, the resemblance of all the captains, the likeness of the sons of Babylon, and of the land of the Chaldeans wherein they were born,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kupeista vyötetyitä ja kirjavat lakit heidän päässänsä, jotka kaikki olivat nähdä niinkuin päämiehet, niinkuin Babelin lapset ja Kaldealaiset pitävät isänsä maalla,
verses.king_james: Girded with girdles upon their loins, exceeding in dyed attire upon their heads, all of them princes to look to, after the manner of the Babylonians of Chaldea, the land of their nativity:

verses.latin_vulgate: insanivit super eos concupiscentia oculorum suorum,  et misit nuntios ad eos in Chaldæam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (ותעגב) [וַתַּעְגְּבָ֥ה] עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם לְמַרְאֵ֣ה עֵינֶ֑יהָ וַתִּשְׁלַ֧ח מַלְאָכִ֛ים אֲלֵיהֶ֖ם כַּשְׂדִּֽימָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: She doted upon them with the lust of her eyes, and she sent messengers to them into Chaldea.
verses.finnish_biblia: Syttyi hän heihin niin pian kuin hän näki heidät, ja hän lähetti sanansaattajat heidän tykönsä Kaldeaan.
verses.king_james: And as soon as she saw them with her eyes, she doted upon them, and sent messengers unto them into Chaldea.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque venissent ad eam filii Babylonis ad cubile mammarum,  polluerunt eam stupris suis :  et polluta est ab eis,  et saturata est anima ejus ab illis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֨אוּ אֵלֶ֤יהָ בְנֵֽי־בָבֶל֙ לְמִשְׁכַּ֣ב דֹּדִ֔ים וַיְטַמְּא֥וּ אוֹתָ֖הּ בְּתַזְנוּתָ֑ם וַתִּ֨טְמָא־בָ֔ם וַתֵּ֥קַע נַפְשָׁ֖הּ מֵהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the sons of Babylon were come to her to the bed of love, they defiled her with their fornications, and she was polluted by them, and her soul was glutted with them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin nyt Babelin lapset hänen tykönsä tulivat, häntä makaaman hekumassansa, saastuttivat he hänen huoruudellansa; ja se saastutti itsensä heidän kanssansa, niin että hän heihin suuttui.
verses.king_james: And the Babylonians came to her into the bed of love, and they defiled her with their whoredom, and she was polluted with them, and her mind was alienated from them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Denudavit quoque fornicationes suas,  et discooperuit ignominiam suam :  et recessit anima mea ab ea,  sicut recesserat anima mea a sorore ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתְּגַל֙ תַּזְנוּתֶ֔יהָ וַתְּגַ֖ל אֶת־עֶרְוָתָ֑הּ וַתֵּ֤קַע נַפְשִׁי֙ מֵעָלֶ֔יהָ כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר נָקְעָ֥ה נַפְשִׁ֖י מֵעַ֥ל אֲחוֹתָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she discovered her fornications, and discovered her disgrace: and my soul was alienated from her, as my soul was alienated from her sister.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin hänen huoruutensa ja häpiänsä niin peräti ilmituli, suutuin minä myös häneen, niinkuin minä hänen sisareensa suuttunut olin.
verses.king_james: So she discovered her whoredoms, and discovered her nakedness: then my mind was alienated from her, like as my mind was alienated from her sister.

verses.latin_vulgate: multiplicavit enim fornicationes suas,  recordans dies adolescentiæ suæ,  quibus fornicata est in terra Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּרְבֶּ֖ה אֶת־תַּזְנוּתֶ֑יהָ לִזְכֹּר֙ אֶת־יְמֵ֣י נְעוּרֶ֔יהָ אֲשֶׁ֥ר זָנְתָ֖ה בְּאֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For she multiplied her fornications, remembering the days of her youth, in which she played the harlot in the land of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän teki aina enemmän huorin ja muisti nuoruutensa aikaa, jona hän Egyptissä huorin tehnyt oli.
verses.king_james: Yet she multiplied her whoredoms, in calling to remembrance the days of her youth, wherein she had played the harlot in the land of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et insanivit libidine super concubitum eorum,  quorum carnes sunt ut carnes asinorum,  et sicut fluxus equorum fluxus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽתַּעְגְּבָ֔ה עַ֖ל פִּֽלַגְשֵׁיהֶ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֤ר בְּשַׂר־חֲמוֹרִים֙ בְּשָׂרָ֔ם וְזִרְמַ֥ת סוּסִ֖ים זִרְמָתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she was mad with lust after lying with them whose flesh is as the flesh of asses: and whose issue as the issue of horses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja syttyi himoon heidän jalkavaimoinsa kanssa, joiden liha on niinkuin aasien liha, ja heidän himonsa niinkuin hevosten himo.
verses.king_james: For she doted upon their paramours, whose flesh is as the flesh of asses, and whose issue is like the issue of horses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et visitasti scelus adolescentiæ tuæ,  quando subacta sunt in Ægypto ubera tua,  et confractæ sunt mammæ pubertatis tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽתִּפְקְדִ֔י אֵ֖ת זִמַּ֣ת נְעוּרָ֑יִךְ בַּעְשׂ֤וֹת מִמִּצְרַ֙יִם֙ דַּדַּ֔יִךְ לְמַ֖עַן שְׁדֵ֥י נְעוּרָֽיִךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And thou hast renewed the wickedness of thy youth, when thy breasts were pressed in Egypt, and the paps of thy virginity broken.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinä teit häpiäs, niinkuin nuoruudessas, kuin Egyptissä sinun rintaas pideltiin, ja sinun nuoruutes nisiä taputeltiin.
verses.king_james: Thus thou calledst to remembrance the lewdness of thy youth, in bruising thy teats by the Egyptians for the paps of thy youth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea, Ooliba, hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Ecce ego suscitabo omnes amatores tuos contra te,  de quibus satiata est anima tua,  et congregabo eos adversum te in circuitu :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֣ן אׇהֳלִיבָ֗ה כֹּה־אָמַר֮ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִה֒ הִנְנִ֨י מֵעִ֤יר אֶת־מְאַהֲבַ֙יִךְ֙ עָלַ֔יִךְ אֵ֛ת אֲשֶׁר־נָקְעָ֥ה נַפְשֵׁ֖ךְ מֵהֶ֑ם וַהֲבֵאתִ֥ים עָלַ֖יִךְ מִסָּבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore, Ooliba, thus saith the Lord God: Behold I will raise up against thee all thy lovers with whom thy soul hath been glutted: and I will gather them together against thee round about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden, Oholiba, näin sanoo Herra, Herra: katso, minä tahdon sinun värtämiehes, joihinkas suuttunut olet, kehoittaa sinua vastaan, ja tahdon heitä tuoda joka taholta sinua vastaan:
verses.king_james: Therefore, O Aholibah, thus saith the Lord God; Behold, I will raise up thy lovers against thee, from whom thy mind is alienated, and I will bring them against thee on every side;

verses.latin_vulgate: filios Babylonis, et universos Chaldæos,  nobiles, tyrannosque, et principes,  omnes filios Assyriorum,  juvenes forma egregia,  duces et magistratus universos,  principes principum, et nominatos ascensores equorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֧י בָבֶ֣ל וְכׇל־כַּשְׂדִּ֗ים פְּק֤וֹד וְשׁ֙וֹעַ֙ וְק֔וֹעַ כׇּל־בְּנֵ֥י אַשּׁ֖וּר אוֹתָ֑ם בַּח֨וּרֵי חֶ֜מֶד פַּח֤וֹת וּסְגָנִים֙ כֻּלָּ֔ם שָֽׁלִשִׁים֙ וּקְרוּאִ֔ים רֹכְבֵ֥י סוּסִ֖ים כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The children of Babylon, and all the Chaldeans, the nobles, and the kings, and princes, all the sons of the Assyrians, beautiful young men, all the captains, and rulers, the princes of princes, and the renowned horsemen.
verses.finnish_biblia: Babelin lapset ja kaikki Kaldealaiset, päämiehet, herrat ja valtamiehet, ja kaikki Assyrialaiset heidän kanssansa, kauniit, nuoret miehet, kaikki päämiehet ja esimiehet, valtamiehet, ja ylimmäiset, ja kaikkinaiset hevosmiehet.
verses.king_james: The Babylonians, and all the Chaldeans, Pekod, and Shoa, and Koa, and all the Assyrians with them: all of them desirable young men, captains and rulers, great lords and renowned, all of them riding upon horses.

verses.latin_vulgate: et venient super te instructi curru et rota,  multitudo populorum :  lorica, et clypeo, et galea armabuntur contra te undique :  et dabo coram eis judicium,  et judicabunt te judiciis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָ֣אוּ עָלַ֡יִךְ הֹ֠צֶן רֶ֤כֶב וְגַלְגַּל֙ וּבִקְהַ֣ל עַמִּ֔ים צִנָּ֤ה וּמָגֵן֙ וְקוֹבַ֔ע יָשִׂ֥ימוּ עָלַ֖יִךְ סָבִ֑יב וְנָתַתִּ֤י לִפְנֵיהֶם֙ מִשְׁפָּ֔ט וּשְׁפָט֖וּךְ בְּמִשְׁפְּטֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall come upon thee well appointed with chariot and wheel, a multitude of people: they shall be armed against thee on every side with breastplate, and buckler, and helmet: and I will set judgment before them, and they shall judge thee by their judgments.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he tulevat valmistettuna sinun päälles vaunuilla ja rattailla ja suurella väen joukolla, ja piirittävät sinun keihäillä, kilvillä ja rautalakeilla joka taholta. Niiden haltuun minä oikeuden annan, että he sinun tuomitsevat lakinsa jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And they shall come against thee with chariots, wagons, and wheels, and with an assembly of people, which shall set against thee buckler and shield and helmet round about: and I will set judgment before them, and they shall judge thee according to their judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ponam zelum meum in te,  quem exercent tecum in furore :  nasum tuum et aures tuas præcident,  et quæ remanserint, gladio concident.  Ipsi filios tuos et filias tuas capient,  et novissimum tuum devorabitur igni :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתִּ֨י קִנְאָתִ֜י בָּ֗ךְ וְעָשׂ֤וּ אוֹתָךְ֙ בְּחֵמָ֔ה אַפֵּ֤ךְ וְאׇזְנַ֙יִךְ֙ יָסִ֔ירוּ וְאַחֲרִיתֵ֖ךְ בַּחֶ֣רֶב תִּפּ֑וֹל הֵ֗מָּה בָּנַ֤יִךְ וּבְנוֹתַ֙יִךְ֙ יִקָּ֔חוּ וְאַחֲרִיתֵ֖ךְ תֵּאָכֵ֥ל בָּאֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will set my jealousy against thee, which they shall execute upon thee with fury: they shall cut off thy nose and thy ears: and what remains shall fall by the sword: they shall take thy sons, and thy daughters, and thy residue shall be devoured by fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä annan minun kiivauteni tulla sinun päälles, että he armottomasti sinun kanssas toimittavat; heidän pitää sinun nenäs ja korvas leikkaaman, ja mitä jää, pitää miekalla lankeeman. Heidän pitää sinun poikas ja tyttäres ottaman pois, ja tähteet pitää poltettaman tulella.
verses.king_james: And I will set my jealousy against thee, and they shall deal furiously with thee: they shall take away thy nose and thine ears; and thy remnant shall fall by the sword: they shall take thy sons and thy daughters; and thy residue shall be devoured by the fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: et denudabunt te vestimentis tuis,  et tollent vasa gloriæ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִפְשִׁיט֖וּךְ אֶת־בְּגָדָ֑יִךְ וְלָקְח֖וּ כְּלֵ֥י תִפְאַרְתֵּֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall strip thee of thy garments, and take away the instruments of thy glory.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän pitää sinun vaattees riisuman, ja sinun kaunistukses ottaman pois.
verses.king_james: They shall also strip thee out of thy clothes, and take away thy fair jewels.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et requiescere faciam scelus tuum de te,  et fornicationem tuam de terra Ægypti :  nec levabis oculos tuos ad eos,  et Ægypti non recordaberis amplius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִשְׁבַּתִּ֤י זִמָּתֵךְ֙ מִמֵּ֔ךְ וְאֶת־זְנוּתֵ֖ךְ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם וְלֹֽא־תִשְׂאִ֤י עֵינַ֙יִךְ֙ אֲלֵיהֶ֔ם וּמִצְרַ֖יִם לֹ֥א תִזְכְּרִי־עֽוֹד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And I will put an end to thy wickedness in thee, and thy fornication brought out of the land of Egypt: neither shalt thou lift up thy eyes to them, nor remember Egypt any more.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin minä tahdon sinun haureutes ja sinun huoruutes Egyptin maasta lopettaa, ettes enää silmiäs nosta heidän peräänsä, etkä Egyptiä enää muistaman pidä.
verses.king_james: Thus will I make thy lewdness to cease from thee, and thy whoredom brought from the land of Egypt: so that thou shalt not lift up thine eyes unto them, nor remember Egypt any more.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Ecce ego tradam te in manus eorum quos odisti,  in manus de quibus satiata est anima tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י כֹ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה הִנְנִי֙ נֹֽתְנָ֔ךְ בְּיַ֖ד אֲשֶׁ֣ר שָׂנֵ֑את בְּיַ֛ד אֲשֶׁר־נָקְעָ֥ה נַפְשֵׁ֖ךְ מֵהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thus saith the Lord God: Behold, I will deliver thee into the hands of them whom thou hatest, into their hands with whom thy soul hath been glutted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä näin sanoo Herra, Herra: katso, minä tahdon sinun niiden haltuun antaa, joita vihaat, ja joihin suuttunut olet.
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord God; Behold, I will deliver thee into the hand of them whom thou hatest, into the hand of them from whom thy mind is alienated:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et agent tecum in odio,  et tollent omnes labores tuos,  et dimittent te nudam et ignominia plenam :  et revelabitur ignominia fornicationum tuarum,  scelus tuum, et fornicationes tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָשׂ֨וּ אוֹתָ֜ךְ בְּשִׂנְאָ֗ה וְלָֽקְחוּ֙ כׇּל־יְגִיעֵ֔ךְ וַעֲזָב֖וּךְ עֵירֹ֣ם וְעֶרְיָ֑ה וְנִגְלָה֙ עֶרְוַ֣ת זְנוּנַ֔יִךְ וְזִמָּתֵ֖ךְ וְתַזְנוּתָֽיִךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall deal with thee in hatred, and they shall take away all thy labours, and shall let thee go naked, and full of disgrace, and the disgrace of thy fornication shall be discovered, thy wickedness, and thy fornications.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne pitää sinulle tekemän niinkuin viholliset, ja ottaman kaikki, mitäs koonnut olet, ja sinut alastomaksi ja paljaaksi jättämän, että sinun saastainen häpiäs ilmi tulis sinun haureutes ja huoruutes kanssa.
verses.king_james: And they shall deal with thee hatefully, and shall take away all thy labour, and shall leave thee naked and bare: and the nakedness of thy whoredoms shall be discovered, both thy lewdness and thy whoredoms.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecerunt hæc tibi,  quia fornicata es post gentes  inter quas polluta es in idolis earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָשֹׂ֥ה אֵ֖לֶּה לָ֑ךְ בִּזְנוֹתֵךְ֙ אַחֲרֵ֣י גוֹיִ֔ם עַ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־נִטְמֵ֖את בְּגִלּוּלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have done these things to thee, because thou hast played the harlot with the nations among which thou wast defiled with their idols.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näitä pitää heidän sinulle tekemän sinun huoruutes tähden, jota sinä pakanain kanssa tehnyt olet, joiden jumalissa sinä itses saastuttanut olet.
verses.king_james: I will do these things unto thee, because thou hast gone a whoring after the heathen, and because thou art polluted with their idols.

verses.latin_vulgate: In via sororis tuæ ambulasti,  et dabo calicem ejus in manu tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּדֶ֥רֶךְ אֲחוֹתֵ֖ךְ הָלָ֑כְתְּ וְנָתַתִּ֥י כוֹסָ֖הּ בְּיָדֵֽךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast walked in the way of thy sister and I will give her cup into thy hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä olet käynyt sisares tietä, sentähden annan minä myös hänen maljansa sinun kätees.
verses.king_james: Thou hast walked in the way of thy sister; therefore will I give her cup into thine hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Calicem sororis tuæ bibes profundum et latum :  eris in derisum et in subsannationem quæ est capacissima.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה כּ֤וֹס אֲחוֹתֵךְ֙ תִּשְׁתִּ֔י הָעֲמֻקָּ֖ה וְהָרְחָבָ֑ה תִּהְיֶ֥ה לִצְחֹ֛ק וּלְלַ֖עַג מִרְבָּ֥ה לְהָכִֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord God: Thou shalt drink thy sister's cup, deep and wide: thou shalt be had in derision and scorn, which containeth very much.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin sanoo Herra, Herra: sinun pitää juoman sisares maljan, syvän ja leviän; sinun pitää niin suureksi nauruksi ja pilkaksi tuleman, että se on ylönpalttinen.
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord God; Thou shalt drink of thy sister’s cup deep and large: thou shalt be laughed to scorn and had in derision; it containeth much.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ebrietate et dolore repleberis :  calice mœroris et tristitiæ,  calice sororis tuæ Samariæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁכָּר֥וֹן וְיָג֖וֹן תִּמָּלֵ֑אִי כּ֚וֹס שַׁמָּ֣ה וּשְׁמָמָ֔ה כּ֖וֹס אֲחוֹתֵ֥ךְ שֹׁמְרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou shalt be filled with drunkenness, and sorrow: with the cup of grief and sadness, with the cup of thy sister Samaria.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun pitää siitä väkevästä juomasta ja vaivasta itses juovuksiin juoman; sillä sinun sisares Samarian malja on vaivan ja hävityksen malja.
verses.king_james: Thou shalt be filled with drunkenness and sorrow, with the cup of astonishment and desolation, with the cup of thy sister Samaria.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et bibes illum, et epotabis usque ad fæces :  et fragmenta ejus devorabis,  et ubera tua lacerabis,  quia ego locutus sum, ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁתִ֨ית אוֹתָ֜הּ וּמָצִ֗ית וְאֶת־חֲרָשֶׂ֛יהָ תְּגָרֵ֖מִי וְשָׁדַ֣יִךְ תְּנַתֵּ֑קִי כִּ֚י אֲנִ֣י דִבַּ֔רְתִּי נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt drink it, and shalt drink it up even to the dregs, and thou shalt devour the fragments thereof, thou shalt rend thy breasts: because I have spoken it, saith the Lord God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sen sinun pitää puhtaaksi juoman, ja lyömän sen kappaleiksi, ja sinun rintas repimän rikki; sillä minä olen sen puhunut, sanoo Herra, Herra.
verses.king_james: Thou shalt even drink it and suck it out, and thou shalt break the sherds thereof, and pluck off thine own breasts: for I have spoken it, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Quia oblita es mei,  et projecisti me post corpus tuum,  tu quoque porta scelus tuum et fornicationes tuas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה יַ֚עַן שָׁכַ֣חַתְּ אוֹתִ֔י וַתַּשְׁלִ֥יכִי אוֹתִ֖י אַחֲרֵ֣י גַוֵּ֑ךְ וְגַם־אַ֛תְּ שְׂאִ֥י זִמָּתֵ֖ךְ וְאֶת־תַּזְנוּתָֽיִךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore thus saith the Lord God: Because thou hast forgotten me, and hast cast me off behind thy back, bear thou also thy wickedness, and thy fornications.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden näin sanoo Herra, Herra: ettäs minun unhottanut ja minun selkäs taa heittänyt olet, niin kanna nyt sinun haureuttas ja huoruuttas.
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God; Because thou hast forgotten me, and cast me behind thy back, therefore bear thou also thy lewdness and thy whoredoms.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Dominus ad me, dicens :   Fili hominis, numquid judicas Oollam et Oolibam,  et annuntias eis scelera earum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֔י בֶּן־אָדָ֕ם הֲתִשְׁפּ֥וֹט אֶֽת־אׇהֳלָ֖ה וְאֶת־אׇהֳלִיבָ֑ה וְהַגֵּ֣ד לָהֶ֔ן אֵ֖ת תּוֹעֲבוֹתֵיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to me, saying: Son of man, dost thou judge Oolla, and Ooliba, and dost thou declare to them their wicked deeds?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi minulle: sinä ihmisen poika, etkö sinä Oholaa ja Oholibaa nuhdella tahdo? näytä heille heidän kauhistuksensa,
verses.king_james: The Lord said moreover unto me; Son of man, wilt thou judge Aholah and Aholibah? yea, declare unto them their abominations;

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia adulteratæ sunt, et sanguis in manibus earum,  et cum idolis suis fornicatæ sunt :  insuper et filios suos quos genuerunt mihi,  obtulerunt eis ad devorandum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י נִאֵ֗פוּ וְדָם֙ בִּֽידֵיהֶ֔ן וְאֶת־גִּלּוּלֵיהֶ֖ן נִאֵ֑פוּ וְגַ֤ם אֶת־בְּנֵיהֶן֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר יָֽלְדוּ־לִ֔י הֶעֱבִ֥ירוּ לָהֶ֖ם לְאׇכְלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because they have committed adultery, and blood is in their hands, and they have committed fornication with their idols: moreover also their children, whom they bore to me, they have offered to them to be devoured.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuinka he ovat huoruudessa olleet ja verta vuotaneet, ja avionsa rikkoneet epäjumalainsa kanssa; niin myös lapsensa, jotka he minulle synnyttäneet olivat, polttivat he niille uhriksi.
verses.king_james: That they have committed adultery, and blood is in their hands, and with their idols have they committed adultery, and have also caused their sons, whom they bare unto me, to pass for them through the fire, to devour them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et hoc fecerunt mihi :  polluerunt sanctuarium meum in die illa,  et sabbata mea profanaverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ע֥וֹד זֹ֖את עָ֣שׂוּ לִ֑י טִמְּא֤וּ אֶת־מִקְדָּשִׁי֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא וְאֶת־שַׁבְּתוֹתַ֖י חִלֵּֽלוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Yea, and they have done this to me. They polluted my sanctuary on the same day, and profaned my sabbaths.
verses.finnish_biblia: Päällisiksi ovat he sen minulle tehneet, että he ovat silloin minun pyhäni saastuttaneet, ja minun sabbatini rikkoneet.
verses.king_james: Moreover this they have done unto me: they have defiled my sanctuary in the same day, and have profaned my sabbaths.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque immolarent filios suos idolis suis,  et ingrederentur sanctuarium meum in die illa ut polluerent illud,  etiam hæc fecerunt in medio domus meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּֽבְשַׁחֲטָ֤ם אֶת־בְּנֵיהֶם֙ לְגִלּ֣וּלֵיהֶ֔ם וַיָּבֹ֧אוּ אֶל־מִקְדָּשִׁ֛י בַּיּ֥וֹם הַה֖וּא לְחַלְּל֑וֹ וְהִנֵּה־כֹ֥ה עָשׂ֖וּ בְּת֥וֹךְ בֵּיתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they sacrificed their children to their idols, and went into my sanctuary the same day to profane it: they did these things even in the midst of my house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kuin he lapsensa epäjumalille tappaneet olivat, menivät he sinä päivänä minun pyhääni, sitä saastuttamaan; katso, niin ovat he minun huoneessani tehneet.
verses.king_james: For when they had slain their children to their idols, then they came the same day into my sanctuary to profane it; and, lo, thus have they done in the midst of mine house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miserunt ad viros venientes de longe,  ad quos nuntium miserant :  itaque ecce venerunt quibus te lavisti,  et circumlinisti stibio oculos tuos,  et ornata es mundo muliebri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַ֗ף כִּ֤י תִשְׁלַ֙חְנָה֙ לַאֲנָשִׁ֔ים בָּאִ֖ים מִמֶּרְחָ֑ק אֲשֶׁ֨ר מַלְאָ֜ךְ שָׁל֤וּחַ אֲלֵיהֶם֙ וְהִנֵּה־בָ֔אוּ לַאֲשֶׁ֥ר רָחַ֛צְתְּ כָּחַ֥לְתְּ עֵינַ֖יִךְ וְעָדִ֥ית עֶֽדִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: They sent for men coming from afar, to whom they had sent a messenger: and behold they came: for whom thou didst wash thyself, and didst paint thy eyes, and wast adorned with women's ornaments.
verses.finnish_biblia: He ovat myös lähettäneet miesten perään, jotka kaukaisilta mailta tuleman piti; kuin sana oli lähetetty heidän tykönsä, niin katso, he tulivat; ja sinä pesit itse heidän tähtensä, ja voitelit silmäs ja kaunistit sinus kaunistuksella,
verses.king_james: And furthermore, that ye have sent for men to come from far, unto whom a messenger was sent; and, lo, they came: for whom thou didst wash thyself, paintedst thy eyes, and deckedst thyself with ornaments,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sedisti in lecto pulcherrimo,  et mensa ornata est ante te :  thymiama meum et unguentum meum posuisti super eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָשַׁבְתְּ֙ עַל־מִטָּ֣ה כְבוּדָּ֔ה וְשֻׁלְחָ֥ן עָר֖וּךְ לְפָנֶ֑יהָ וּקְטׇרְתִּ֥י וְשַׁמְנִ֖י שַׂ֥מְתְּ עָלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou sattest on a very fine bed, and a table was decked before thee: whereupon thou didst set my incense, and my ointment.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja istuit kauniilla vuoteella, jonka edessä pöytä oli valmistettu; ja sinä suitsutit ja uhrasit minun öljyni sen päällä.
verses.king_james: And satest upon a stately bed, and a table prepared before it, whereupon thou hast set mine incense and mine oil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vox multitudinis exsultantis erat in ea :  et in viris, qui de multitudine hominum adducebantur,  et veniebant de deserto,  posuerunt armillas in manibus eorum,  et coronas speciosas in capitibus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְק֣וֹל הָמוֹן֮ שָׁלֵ֣ו בָֿהּ֒ וְאֶל־אֲנָשִׁים֙ מֵרֹ֣ב אָדָ֔ם מוּבָאִ֥ים (סובאים) [סׇבָאִ֖ים] מִמִּדְבָּ֑ר וַֽיִּתְּנ֤וּ צְמִידִים֙ אֶל־יְדֵיהֶ֔ן וַעֲטֶ֥רֶת תִּפְאֶ֖רֶת עַל־רָאשֵׁיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there was in her the voice of a multitude rejoicing: and to some that were brought of the multitude of men, and that came from the desert, they put bracelets on their hands, and beautiful crowns on their heads.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siellä oli suruttoman kansan ääni; ja paitsi niitä miehiä yhteisestä kansasta, tuotiin myös sinne Sabealaisia korvesta, jotka antoivat renkaita heidän käsiinsä ja kauniita seppeleitä heidän päähänsä.
verses.king_james: And a voice of a multitude being at ease was with her: and with the men of the common sort were brought Sabeans from the wilderness, which put bracelets upon their hands, and beautiful crowns upon their heads.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi ei, quæ attrita est in adulteriis :  Nunc fornicabitur in fornicatione sua etiam hæc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֕ר לַבָּלָ֖ה נִֽאוּפִ֑ים (עת) [עַתָּ֛ה] (יזנה) [יִזְנ֥וּ] תַזְנוּתֶ֖הָ וָהִֽיא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I said to her that was worn out in her adulteries: Now will this woman still continue in her fornication.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä ajattelin: se on tottunut huoruuteen vanhuudesta, ei se taida lakata huoruudestansa.
verses.king_james: Then said I unto her that was old in adulteries, Will they now commit whoredoms with her, and she with them?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ingressi sunt ad eam quasi ad mulierem meretricem :  sic ingrediebantur ad Oollam et Oolibam, mulieres nefarias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּב֣וֹא אֵלֶ֔יהָ כְּב֖וֹא אֶל־אִשָּׁ֣ה זוֹנָ֑ה כֵּ֣ן בָּ֗אוּ אֶֽל־אׇהֳלָה֙ וְאֶל־אׇ֣הֳלִיבָ֔ה אִשֹּׁ֖ת הַזִּמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they went in to her, as to a harlot: so went they in unto Oolla, and Ooliba, wicked women.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hänen tykönsä mennään niinkuin huoran tykö; juuri niin mennään Oholan ja Oholiban, hävyttömäin vaimoin tykö.
verses.king_james: Yet they went in unto her, as they go in unto a woman that playeth the harlot: so went they in unto Aholah and unto Aholibah, the lewd women.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viri ergo justi sunt :  hi judicabunt eas judicio adulterarum,  et judicio effundentium sanguinem :  quia adulteræ sunt,  et sanguis in manibus earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנָשִׁ֣ים צַדִּיקִ֗ם הֵ֚מָּה יִשְׁפְּט֣וּ אֽוֹתְהֶ֔ם מִשְׁפַּט֙ נֹֽאֲפ֔וֹת וּמִשְׁפַּ֖ט שֹׁפְכ֣וֹת דָּ֑ם כִּ֤י נֹֽאֲפֹת֙ הֵ֔נָּה וְדָ֖ם בִּידֵיהֶֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: They therefore are just men: these shall judge them as adulteresses are judged, and as shedders of blood are judged: because they are adulteresses, and blood is in their hands.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden hurskaat miehet rankaisevat heitä, niinkuin avionsa rikkojat ja veren vuodattajat rangaistaman pitää; sillä he ovat huorat, ja heidän kätensä on verta täynnä.
verses.king_james: And the righteous men, they shall judge them after the manner of adulteresses, and after the manner of women that shed blood; because they are adulteresses, and blood is in their hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc enim dicit Dominus Deus :  Adduc ad eas multitudinem,  et trade eas in tumultum et in rapinam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֛י כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֖ר אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה הַעֲלֵ֤ה עֲלֵיהֶם֙ קָהָ֔ל וְנָתֹ֥ן אֶתְהֶ֖ן לְזַעֲוָ֥ה וְלָבַֽז׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thus saith the Lord God: Bring a multitude upon them, and deliver them over to tumult and rapine:
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin sanoo Herra, Herra: vie suuri joukko heidän päällensä, ja anna heitä ryöstöksi ja saaliiksi,
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord God; I will bring up a company upon them, and will give them to be removed and spoiled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et lapidentur lapidibus populorum,  et confodiantur gladiis eorum :  filios et filias earum interficient,  et domos earum igne succendent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָגְמ֨וּ עֲלֵיהֶ֥ן אֶ֙בֶן֙ קָהָ֔ל וּבָרֵ֥א אוֹתְהֶ֖ן בְּחַרְבוֹתָ֑ם בְּנֵיהֶ֤ם וּבְנֽוֹתֵיהֶם֙ יַהֲרֹ֔גוּ וּבָתֵּיהֶ֖ן בָּאֵ֥שׁ יִשְׂרֹֽפוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And let the people stone them with stone, and let them be stabbed with their swords: they shall kill their sons and daughters, and their houses they shall burn with fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka heidät kivittäisivät ja heidät miekoillansa pistäisivät lävitse, ja heidän poikansa ja tyttärensä surmaisivat, ja heidän huoneensa tulella polttaisivat.
verses.king_james: And the company shall stone them with stones, and dispatch them with their swords; they shall slay their sons and their daughters, and burn up their houses with fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et auferam scelus de terra,  et discent omnes mulieres ne faciant secundum scelus earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִשְׁבַּתִּ֥י זִמָּ֖ה מִן־הָאָ֑רֶץ וְנִוַּסְּרוּ֙ כׇּל־הַנָּשִׁ֔ים וְלֹ֥א תַעֲשֶׂ֖ינָה כְּזִמַּתְכֶֽנָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will take away wickedness out of the land: and all women shall learn, not to do according to the wickedness of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin minä tahdon huoruuden maalta lopettaa; että kaikki vaimot pitää oppiman, eikä tekemän senkaltaista haureutta.
verses.king_james: Thus will I cause lewdness to cease out of the land, that all women may be taught not to do after your lewdness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dabunt scelus vestrum super vos,  et peccata idolorum vestrorum portabitis :  et scietis quia ego Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתְנ֤וּ זִמַּתְכֶ֙נָה֙ עֲלֵיכֶ֔ן וַחֲטָאֵ֥י גִלּוּלֵיכֶ֖ן תִּשֶּׂ֑אינָה וִידַעְתֶּ֕ם כִּ֥י אֲנִ֖י אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall render your wickedness upon you, and you shall bear the sins of your idols: and you shall know that I am the Lord God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teidän haureutenne pannaan teidän päällenne, ja teidän pitää epäjumalainne syntiä kantaman, tietääksenne minun olevan Herran, Herran.
verses.king_james: And they shall recompense your lewdness upon you, and ye shall bear the sins of your idols: and ye shall know that I am the Lord God.
